highlights.description: Go-first specification library for data-driven presentations with JSON Schema generated from Go types
HTML and PDF rendering with 12 widget types for dashboards and executive presentations
Live development server with hot reload for rapid iteration

added.description: Core specification types: PresentationSpec, SlideSpec, Widget, Layout, Theme, Narrative, DataSource, ExportConfig
12 widget types: metric_card, content_block, chart, table, risk_list, decision_list, checklist, diagram, callout, quote, image, code
6 slide types: title, content, dashboard, section, summary, blank
JSON Schema generation from Go types using invopop/jsonschema
Embedded schema with //go:embed for runtime validation
HTML rendering using a-h/templ templates with responsive CSS
Watch mode for auto-rebuild on file changes
Speaker notes view with timer and keyboard navigation
Data source loading: JSON, CSV, REST API with auth
Prism.js syntax highlighting for code blocks
`render` CLI with HTML/PDF output, validation, watch mode, and dev server

documentation.description: MkDocs documentation site with Material theme
Getting started guides: installation, quickstart, CLI reference
Specification docs: presentation, slides, widgets, layouts, themes, datasources
User guides: dashboards, data sources, themes, speaker notes
README with quick start and feature overview

tests.description: Unit tests for spec type marshaling/unmarshaling
Data loader tests for JSON, CSV, and API sources
